Patch Set 24: Code-Review-1

New code updates looks okay; tried to verify also with minimal test

Few observation from my test and logs you sent
1)	On failure Basic auth return http code should be 401.
2)	For Certbaseauth type – same issue as #1
3)	Logs you provided does not show all curl execution updates done under Certbaseauth type? 
4)	For Certbaseauth and certonly – when the authentication failed, failure response code was not being sent.
